testcase.name: testDuplicateEmailThrowsDuplicateEmailException

Unknown data type: "INET"; SQL statement:
create table trusted_ips ( created_at timestamp(6) with time zone, id bigint generated by default as identity, last_seen_at timestamp(6) with time zone, owner_id uuid not null, ip_address inet not testcase.name: testSignupSucceedsEvenIfTrustedIpServiceFails
